category_sources: source_facts.description says goshs is a feature-rich web server written in Go; official goshs homepage describes pentest/CTF-focused HTTP/S, WebDAV, FTP/SFTP, SMB, LDAP/S, DNS/SMTP capabilities.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is goshs; official homepage and repository use the lowercase project name goshs.
docs_sources: Official goshs homepage links to docs.goshs.de as Documentation/Read the Docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/patrickhener/goshs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official goshs homepage feature list names HTTP/S, WebDAV, FTP/SFTP, SMB, LDAP/S, DNS/SMTP callbacks, pentesting, and CTF use cases.
